signals.headline: SEC and CFTC Joint Release Confirms XRP as 'Digital Commodity' | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]
signals.raw:
SEC and CFTC Joint Release Confirms XRP as 'Digital Commodity' | YES | HIGH confidence** [2]  
This March 2026 classification shifts XRP from SEC security jurisdiction to CFTC spot market oversight, enabling institutional adoption and resolving long-standing regulatory uncertainty, with $1.44B in spot XRP ETF inflows maintained.[2] It aligns with whale accumulation (1.3B XRP added in 48 hours) and

signals.raw:
Senate CLARITY Act Nears Markup with Stablecoin Yield Compromise | NO (pending confirmation) | MED confidence** [2][4]  
Tentative agreement by Senators Tillis and Alsobrooks with White House on stablecoin yield exemption, setting April 13 Senate return for potential formal markup; success could boost XRP to $1.80 as XRPL hub for yield-bearing assets.[2][4] XRPL node upgrade deadline on April 6 ad
